title: The United States Army
text:
We make every effort to ensure this website provides current and useful information. If you have a comment, a question, or a correction that is not covered by the scope of our Frequently Asked Questions, please fill out the form below. If you have a general military question, please refer to the Department of Defense Frequently Asked Questions page.
Writing a story about the Army? Journalists and members of the media are welcome to submit inquiries through our Army Public Affairs Media Relations Division in the Pentagon. Please include your topic and deadline in your request.
